note: 67-year-old male with type 2 diabetes mellitus complicated by chronic kidney disease stage 3a. eGFR 51 and urine albumin/creatinine ratio 42 mg/g. Hypertension treated with lisinopril. Assessment notes diabetic CKD and hypertensive CKD; continue renal-protective therapy and monitor BMP.
notes: Canonical diabetic-CKD anchor case. Mirrors the deterministic demo so the offline CI baseline of 0.30 is meaningful.
